raw_source.title: [Remote] Babylon is looking for senior software engineer
raw_source.body:
## About Babylon
Babylon is a blockchain project founded by Claude. E. Shannon Award recipient, Professor David Tse from Stanford University. We are proudly backed by leading investors including Polychain, Hack VC, and Framework. The project’s mission is to unlock Bitcoin security for the decentralized world. Our fast-growing team consists of engineers, researchers, and seasoned business experts. Our team culture is open, inclusive, agile, and passionate, and we highly value everyone’s personal growth.

## Responsibilities
We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to join our team and contribute to one of the most cutting-edge projects in crypto: BitVM Bridge. You will take ownership of the design, development, and maintenance of critical bridge components, including:

BitVM Bridge libraries

Peripheral tools and applications surrounding the bridge

CosmWasm smart contracts on the Babylon chain for bridge-related interactions

Your work will directly impact the interoperability between the Bitcoin chain and the Babylon chain, advancing the state of decentralized security and usability.

## Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent.

Experience:

3+ years of hands-on experience working with Bitcoin, Ethereum, or other major blockchain platforms.

2+ years of systems programming experience, particularly in Rust.

Skills:

Deep understanding of cryptographic primitives and their implementations.

Strong grasp of CI/CD practices and tools to ensure seamless and reliable deployments.

Excellent communication skills, fluent in English, to collaborate effectively in a global team.

## Nice to Haves
Academic research experience or publications in cryptography, blockchain, or related fields.

Hands-on experience with Layer 2 scaling solutions (e.g., Rollups, State Channels).

Hands-on experience with ZKVM / BTC / Taproot / BitVM.

Contributions to open-source blockchain projects.

## Job Nature
We’re searching for a skilled, crypto-native engineer with a deep understanding of Bitcoin, consensus mechanisms, and blockchain security. You should have a proven track record of working with cutting-edge Bitcoin tooling and a strong commitment to following best practices in software development. You are responsible, collaborative, and excited to contribute to groundbreaking advancements in blockchain technology.

- Full-time or not: YES
- Remote or not: YES

## Salary and Benefits
200K +

## Work Location
Remote

## Contact
Gigi
gigi.yip@babylonlabs.io

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

comments.body:
Hi, 
I am a senior full stack blockchain developer with over 8 years of experience.
I am very interested in your project.
Here's my [resume](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Qng_lABu_77Z47ZhV1mNlfKAquuZymFm/view?usp=sharing).
Looking forward to hearing from you.
Thanks,
Robert
comments.author: trevor0106

comments.body: @robertfischman Just let you know the information here is public, if you don't want to make your information public, you can send email instead
comments.author: luckyyang

raw_source.author: gigiyip0123
